examples: The fracture appearance is dimple at room temperature, it changes into intercrystalline fracture at low-temperature.
The results shows that the main reason of stainless steel pipe cracking is that intercrystalline corrosion result in creep rupture.
The pore space consists of intergranular pore, intergranular dissolved pore, intragranular dissolved pore, intercrystalline pore, moldic pore and fracture.
